expectations.text: Camera Y position is approximately 66 inches (5.5 ft eye height above floor at Z=0)
Camera position is near the front face of the building (Z small/near-zero or slightly positive)
lookAt target points inward along building depth (Z positive / into building), not outward
GSAP animation or easeInOutCubic lerp used for the camera transition (not an instant snap)
expectations.evidence: gsap.to() with ease: 'power2.inOut' for both position and target

expectations.text: Integration into the existing preset view table shown with Preset name 'Walkthrough'
expectations.evidence: PRESETS array extended with Walkthrough entry

expectations.text: OrbitControls target updated to a point inside the building (not left at exterior default)
Camera config follows project standards: FOV 50, near 0.1, far 5000
expectations.evidence: Suggests changing FOV to 70-90 for first-person feel — departs from the project's required FOV 50. Near/far not explicitly confirmed.
